title: Sandbox – Memory System

classes.name: Memory
classes.notes: Core capability. Requires Shell; also Filesystem when live_update=True. instructions() reads memory_summary.md and renders a memory read prompt for the agent.

classes.name: SandboxMemoryGenerationManager
methods: async enqueue_result(result, *, exception, input_override, rollout_id) -> None
classes.notes: Central orchestrator. Registered as pre-stop hook on session (flush). Worker processes rollout files through phase-one, then flush triggers phase-two. WeakKeyDictionary keyed by session.

classes.name: SandboxMemoryStorage
methods: async write_text(path: Path, text: str) -> None
classes.notes: Manages filesystem I/O for memory directories: sessions/, memories/, raw_memories/, rollout_summaries/, phase_two_selection.json. Delegates all FS ops to BaseSandboxSession.

classes.name: RolloutExtractionArtifacts
classes.notes: Phase-one LLM output schema. Also defined as ROLLOUT_EXTRACTION_ARTIFACTS_JSON_SCHEMA and ROLLOUT_EXTRACTION_ARTIFACTS_TEXT_FORMAT constants.

classes.name: PhaseTwoSelectionItem
classes.notes: Represents one rollout entry used in phase-two consolidation selection.

classes.name: PhaseTwoInputSelection
classes.notes: Immutable selection passed to run_phase_two() and prompts module.

classes.name: RolloutTerminalMetadata
classes.notes: Appended to every rollout JSONL payload. Derived from RunResultBase and exceptions.

classes.name: MemoryLayoutConfig
classes.notes: Configures directory paths for memory and session rollout storage.

classes.name: MemoryGenerateConfig
classes.notes: Controls which models run phase-one extraction and phase-two consolidation, and their settings.

classes.name: MemoryReadConfig
classes.notes: When live_update=True the agent may edit MEMORY.md in-place to fix stale facts.

module_level_functions.name: run_phase_one
module_level_functions.signature: async run_phase_one(*, config: MemoryGenerateConfig, prompt: str, run_config: RunConfig) -> RolloutExtractionArtifacts
module_level_functions.notes: Creates a SandboxAgent named 'sandbox-memory-phase-one' using config.phase_one_model; runs Runner.run(); returns typed RolloutExtractionArtifacts.

module_level_functions.name: render_phase_one_prompt
module_level_functions.notes: Parses JSONL rollout, builds terminal_metadata dict, truncates to 150k tokens, calls render_rollout_extraction_user_prompt.

module_level_functions.name: validate_rollout_artifacts
module_level_functions.notes: Returns False if all fields empty; raises ValueError if partially empty.

module_level_functions.name: run_phase_two
module_level_functions.signature: async run_phase_two(*, config: MemoryGenerateConfig, memory_root: str, selection: PhaseTwoInputSelection, run_config: RunConfig) -> None
module_level_functions.notes: Creates SandboxAgent named 'sandbox-memory-phase-two'; renders memory_consolidation_prompt; runs Runner.run(). No structured output — agent edits MEMORY.md directly.

module_level_functions.name: get_or_create_memory_generation_manager
module_level_functions.notes: Factory keyed by (session, layout_key=(memories_dir, sessions_dir)). Enforces uniqueness of memories_dir and sessions_dir per session.

module_level_functions.name: build_rollout_payload_from_result
module_level_functions.notes: Sanitizes run items (excludes compaction/image/reasoning), adds terminal_metadata.

module_level_functions.name: write_rollout
module_level_functions.signature: async write_rollout(*, session, rollout_contents, rollouts_path, file_name) -> Path
module_level_functions.notes: Appends JSONL line to per-rollout file in sessions_dir. Allocates uuid4 filename if file_name not given.

module_level_functions.name: render_memory_read_prompt / render_memory_consolidation_prompt / render_rollout_extraction_prompt
module_level_functions.notes: Load markdown templates from prompts/ subdir (cached). Inject memory_dir, memory_summary, extra_prompt, PhaseTwoInputSelection.

rollout_lifecycle: 2. enqueue_rollout_payload() → write_rollout() → JSONL appended to sessions/<rollout_id>.jsonl
3. flush() (called by pre-stop hook): collects rollout files → _queue → _worker()
important_notes: Phase-one model default: gpt-5.4-mini with Reasoning(effort=medium). Extracts rollout_slug, rollout_summary, raw_memory.
Phase-two model default: gpt-5.4 with Reasoning(effort=medium). Consolidates raw memories into MEMORY.md (no structured output).
Rollout token cap: 150k tokens (approx 70% of context window). Truncation adds an omission marker.
max_raw_memories_for_consolidation default 256, max 4096. Sorted by updated_at descending.
Memory.instructions() is called by the agent framework to inject memory context into system prompt. Returns None if no memory_summary.md or if read=None.
live_update=True (default) allows agent to edit MEMORY.md in-place during a run to fix stale facts.
WeakKeyDictionary ensures managers are GC'd when sessions close. Layout key = (memories_dir, sessions_dir) tuple.
Terminal states tracked: completed, interrupted, cancelled, failed, max_turns_exceeded, guardrail_tripped.
